text:
アンタもやるようになったわねぇ。
ついこの間までは
ただのへっぽこぴーだったのに。

さ、次の課題もいつも通りの涼しい顔で
こなしてきちゃいなさいよ。

私が多少認めてあげてるんだから
カッコ悪いところ見せたら
承知しないわよ！　いいわね

You've come a long way, especially for
someone who was clomping around in
clown shoes until only recently.

Now, go handle this with a cool, collected
demeanor like you always do.

But listen good! Just because I've
acknowledged that you've made some
progress doesn't mean you can get away
with any bumbling around now.
